revision.comment: Bot: create category from de/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[de:Category:Archäologischer Fund (Afrika)]] [[commons:Category:Archaeological objects in Africa]] [[fa:Category:اکتشافات باستان‌شناسی در آفریقا]] [[id:Category:Penemuan arkeologi di Afrika]] [[mn:Category:Африкийн археологийн олдвор]] [[nl:Category:Archeologische vondst in Afrika]] [[tr:Category:Afrika'daki arkeolojik keşifler]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Papyrus Carlsberg 1]].

{{wikidata link|Q8881113|co|commons:Category:Archaeological objects in Africa|de|Category:Archäologischer Fund (Afrika)|en|Category:Archaeological discoveries in Africa|fa|Category:اکتشافات باستان‌شناسی در آفریقا|id|Category:Penemuan arkeologi di Afrika|mn|Category:Африкийн археологийн олдвор|nl|Category:Archeologische vondst in Afrika|tr|Category:Afrika'daki arkeolojik keşifler}}
